hardeningActions.observation: Tenant CRD lacked explicit sync-wave ordering, risking race conditions for future Tenant resources.
hardeningActions.fix: Added sync-wave -4 plus retry and standard sync options to install the CRD early.

hardeningActions.observation: CloudNativePG operator lacked explicit sync-wave ordering, risking CRD races for database instances.
hardeningActions.fix: Added sync-wave 1 to align with other database operators and ensure CRDs/controllers land before database-instances.

hardeningActions.observation: Blackbox exporter lacked retry/backoff and standard sync options, risking manual re-sync on transient failures.
hardeningActions.fix: Added retry/backoff and prune/ignore sync options for more resilient GitOps syncs.

hardeningActions.observation: Alertmanager lacked retry/backoff and prune ordering, risking manual re-syncs on transient Helm or secret timing failures.
hardeningActions.fix: Added retry/backoff plus prune ordering options to improve sync resilience.

hardeningActions.observation: Fluent Bit lacked retry/backoff and standard prune/ignore options, increasing the chance of manual re-syncs after transient drift.
hardeningActions.fix: Added retry/backoff plus PruneLast and RespectIgnoreDifferences for more resilient GitOps syncs.

hardeningActions.observation: ArgoCD Image Updater lacked sync-wave ordering and standard sync options, risking early sync drift and manual re-syncs.
hardeningActions.fix: Added sync-wave 1 plus standard prune/ignore options and SkipDryRunOnMissingResource for resiliency.

hardeningActions.observation: CRD-heavy apps can fail dry-run validation before CRDs register, leaving them OutOfSync and requiring manual re-syncs.
hardeningActions.fix: Added SkipDryRunOnMissingResource and PruneLast (plus prune propagation for ClickHouse) to improve CRD sync resilience.

hardeningActions.observation: AI/database operators can fail initial sync when ArgoCD dry-runs custom resources before CRDs register, leaving dependent stacks OutOfSync.
hardeningActions.fix: Enabled SkipDryRunOnMissingResource for operator Applications to tolerate CRD registration lag.

hardeningActions.observation: Platform-ingress applies headscale resources even when headscale apps are disabled, which can fail if the headscale namespace does not exist.
hardeningActions.fix: Added the headscale namespace to the platform-namespaces app so it exists before platform-ingress syncs.

hardeningActions.observation: ExternalSecrets for cto/external-dns namespaces can fail initial sync when those namespaces are created later by workloads, leaving external-secrets-config degraded and credentials missing.
hardeningActions.fix: Added early namespace provisioning and shifted external-secrets-config to sync after namespace apps; disabled CTO chart namespace creation in GitOps to avoid shared ownership.

hardeningActions.observation: Argo Events/Workflows and ARC controller can remain OutOfSync when admission webhook CA bundles rotate after initial sync.
hardeningActions.fix: Ignored webhook CA bundle fields for Mutating/ValidatingWebhookConfiguration resources to prevent drift.

hardeningActions.observation: GitHub webhook sensors can reconcile before CTO workflow templates when github-webhooks and cto-workflows sync in the same wave.
hardeningActions.fix: Moved github-webhooks to sync-wave 1 so workflow templates land before sensors.

hardeningActions.observation: AI ingress HTTPRoute/GRPCRoute resources can fail dry-run validation if Gateway API CRDs are still registering.
hardeningActions.fix: Enabled SkipDryRunOnMissingResource to tolerate CRD registration lag for ai-ingress.

hardeningActions.observation: cert-manager-config and argocd-image-updater disabled namespace creation, which can fail if their target namespaces are not present during initial sync.
hardeningActions.fix: Enabled CreateNamespace to let ArgoCD provision namespaces and avoid namespace race failures.

hardeningActions.observation: Cloudflare operator, CTO workflow templates, and core observability charts lacked retry/backoff, risking manual re-syncs after transient chart/apply errors.
hardeningActions.fix: Added retry/backoff to improve sync resiliency for cloudflare-operator, cto-workflows, prometheus, loki, and kube-state-metrics.

hardeningActions.observation: ExternalSecrets config applies resources in observability/mayastor/openbao namespaces that may not exist during early sync, causing initial failures.
hardeningActions.fix: Expanded platform-namespaces to create observability, mayastor, and openbao namespaces early and added a managed openbao namespace manifest.
